2606.16409.title: PathRouter: Aligning Rewards with Retrieval Quality in Agentic Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation
2606.16409.paper_summary: Agentic GraphRAG trains language-model agents to iteratively retrieve and reason over graph-structured evidence, enabling more accurate and context-aware decision-making by efficiently navigating complex information networks. However, outcome-only reinforcement learning suffers from \textit{\textbf{answer-path reward aliasing}}, where correct answers may come from shortcuts rather than useful evidence paths. It also exhibits \textit{\textbf{search-update ambiguity}}, as scalar trajectory-level feedback does not indicate which retrieval actions to adjust. To mitigate these shortcomings, we present PathRouter, a path-aware training framework for agentic GraphRAG. PathRouter jointly evaluates each trajectory along answer correctness and evidence-path overlap, yielding four trajectory categories with differentiated GRPO advantage scaling that suppresses shortcut reinforcement while preserving evidence-seeking behavior. For evidence-poor trajectories, a frozen gold-evidence teacher provides token-level KL guidance on reasoning and search-query tokens, excluding answer tokens to avoid direct response imitation. Experiments on six QA benchmarks across three model sizes show that PathRouter consistently improves answer F1 and evidence-path overlap, achieving average F1 gains of 3.1 on 3B and 4.9 on 7B models compared to a strong baseline.
2606.16409.paper_summary_zh: Agentic GraphRAG 訓練語言模型代理人，迭代地檢索和推理圖結構證據，使其能夠通過有效地導航複雜的信息網絡來進行更準確和上下文敏感的決策。<lb/>然而，僅基於結果的強化學習存在 \textit{\textbf{答案路徑獎勵混淆}} 的問題，正確答案可能來自捷徑而非有用的證據路徑。<lb/>它還表現出 \textit{\textbf{搜索更新模糊性}}，因為標量軌跡級別的反饋並未指示應調整哪些檢索行動。<lb/>為了減輕這些缺點，我們提出了 PathRouter，一個針對 agentic GraphRAG 的路徑感知訓練框架。<lb/>PathRouter 共同評估每個軌跡的答案正確性和證據路徑重疊，產生四個軌跡類別，具有區分的 GRPO 優勢縮放，抑制捷徑強化的同時保留尋求證據的行為。<lb/>對於證據稀缺的軌跡，凍結的金證據教師提供有關推理和搜索查詢標記的 token 級 KL 指導，排除答案標記以避免直接的回應模仿。<lb/>在三種模型大小的六個 QA 基準上的實驗顯示，PathRouter 一致地提高了答案 F1 和證據路徑重疊，與強基線相比，在 3B 和 7B 模型上分別實現了 3.1 和 4.9 的平均 F1 增益。
2606.16409.author: Bo Wang et.al.
2606.16409.authors: Bo Wang, Heyan Huang, Yaolin Li, Wei Tang, Yuan Zhang, Wenbo Li, Mingze Gao, Ge Shi, Chong Feng
